reference: Hello, I have a three-month-old baby girl. I have not had breast milk from the beginning due to certain reasons. I cannot give formula milk to my baby. So right now, I am giving buffalo milk. What else should I provide her for better nourishment? She has a constipation problem, which may be due to the milk, but I cannot give her breast milk or formula. How can I overcome this? Please help me.
text: Hello, I have a three-month-old baby girl. I have not had breast milk from the beginning due to certain reasons. I cannot give formula milk to my baby, so right now I am giving buffalo milk. What else should I provide her for better nourishment? She has a constipation problem, which may be due to the milk, but I cannot give her breast milk or formula. How can I overcome this? Please help me.
